body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
The stomatal conductance in the pmodel depends on 1/[(ca-ci)+eps], where ca is the atmospheric co2 ppm and ci is intercellular co2 ppm. since stomatal conductance must be positive, ca >= ci. This PR clamps `chi`, the ratio of the two, so that ca >=ci


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: clamp ci <=ca

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Initializes the cache in `LandSimulation` constructor only for offline runs.

Also adds a function to simplify setting weatherquest ICs in the coupler.

I'll test this from the coupler before merging

## Content
- [x] check the model atmosphere type before initializing the cache
- [x] wrap `set_initial_cache!` call in an if statement
- [x] add `make_set_subseasonal_initial_conditions` function to be used to set weatherquest ICs
- [x] tag a new release (minor version) so this can be used in ClimaCoupler

## Dependency updates (with release)
